copy.promptHint: Jot down what you caught before the well swallows it again.
copy.promptPlaceholder: A remembered line, name, or place...
copy.departureStatus: The falcon folds the gathered bundle into its satchel and rises toward the dovecot.
copy.footerWaiting: The well waits for the next line to surface.
copy.handoffLabel: Hand the bundle to the falcon
copy.impatienceStatus: The falcon grows impatient. It wants the gathered bundle now.
copy.observingHint: A scrap hangs in the water. Catch it before it slips your memory.

textual.text: It was almost night as she
Nothing could prepare them for such weather
Elionda was observing herself in the golden embroidered mirror
The house remembered every vow spoken under rain
Someone had written the answer before the question existed
When the bell failed, the birds continued the ceremony
No one noticed the garden leaning closer to hear
By dawn the map had changed its mind again
She kept the key because the lock still dreamed of it
The sea withdrew only long enough to listen
